title: Request for Account Statement
to_address:
The Branch Manager,
State Bank of India,
[Branch Name & Address]
subject: Request for Account Statement
references:
Account No.: __________________
Account Holder: M/s [Company Name]
body:
Respected Sir/Madam,

We hereby request you to kindly issue us the account statement for our Current Account mentioned above for the period from __/__/____ to __/__/____ for our internal accounting and audit purposes.

We request you to provide the statement at the earliest. We shall be highly obliged for your kind cooperation.

Thanking you.
